meta.title: AiGORÀ — The AI Debate Arena
meta.description: Ask a question and watch 4 leading AI models debate each other in real time.

landing.heroSubtitle:
Ask a question, watch the AIs clash in real time.
Or step into the arena yourself.
landing.ctaFinalBody: Pick a format and start now. It takes 30 seconds.

debate.title: Ask a question, watch 4 AIs clash.
debate.body: Claude, GPT, Gemini and Perplexity respond in sequence, read each other's answers and build a collective argument. You can jump in at any time and shake things up.

twoVsTwo.title: You and an AI against two opposing AIs.
twoVsTwo.body: Pick your AI ally and defend your thesis together. On the other side, two AIs are ready to attack you round after round. An AI referee evaluates the arguments and delivers the final verdict.

devil.title: Defend an uncomfortable thesis against the other AIs.
devil.body: Grok assigns you a difficult position to defend. Claude, GPT, Gemini and Perplexity will attack relentlessly, round after round. The longer you hold, the higher your score.

brainstorm.title: Pitch an idea, the AIs deliberate and return a sharper synthesis.
brainstorm.body: Describe your idea in two words or two thousand. The 4 AIs deliberate in two rounds — independently first, then reacting to each other — and return a unified, reasoned response.

mock.chat1: Direct democracy is superior — it removes the intermediaries between citizens and decisions.
mock.chat2: At scale it becomes unworkable. It requires a level of informed participation that has never existed historically.
mock.chat3: Swiss referendum data shows mixed results: high turnout, but rising polarisation.
mock.chat4: Digital platforms are making continuous consultation more feasible — Estonia is proof.
mock.twoMsg1: AI amplifies human creativity, it doesn't replace it.
mock.twoMsg2: Romantic. In the real world, budgets disappear.
mock.twoJudge: Team A stronger on the historical argument.
mock.brainstormResult: Start with the product, not the market.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Free includes 4 AIs and Multiplayer 2v2. Pro and Premium unlock Grok, advanced modes and uploads.
pricing.landingSubtitle: Start free, scale when you're ready.
pricing.footer: Secure payment via Stripe · Monthly billing only · Cancel anytime

free.subtitle: 4 AIs, debates, 2v2 — no credit card needed
free.tagline: 3 debates per week · Claude, GPT, Gemini, Perplexity

pro.subtitle: For frequent and complete use
pro.tagline: Unlimited debates per day · all modes · Grok included
features: Document and image upload: up to 20/month

premium.subtitle: For intensive and advanced use
premium.tagline: Everything in Pro · priority access to new features · document upload
features: Document and image upload: up to 100/month

weeklyDebates.body: The Free plan includes {limit} debates per week. The counter resets {reset}.

dailyDebates.body: The Pro plan includes {limit} debates per day. The counter resets {reset}.

arena.title: Public arena
arena.subtitle: Watch live debates
arena.header: How do you want to debate?
arena.mainSubtitle: Four formats, one arena. Hover to explore.

chat.mobileDesc: Ask a question and watch Claude, GPT, Gemini and Perplexity debate in real time.
chat.title: Debate
chat.desc: Ask a question and watch Claude, GPT, Gemini and Perplexity debate in real time. You can step in at any moment.

2v2.mobileDesc: You + AI vs another human + AI. The referee awards points each round.
2v2.title: 2 vs 2
2v2.desc: Two teams compete. Each team has a human and an allied AI. An AI referee gives the final verdict round after round.

devil.mobileDesc: Defend an uncomfortable position against 4 AIs that will attack you relentlessly.
devil.title: Devil's Advocate
devil.desc: Grok assigns you an uncomfortable position to defend. Claude, GPT, Gemini and Perplexity will attack without mercy. Hold your ground, earn points.

brainstorm.mobileDesc: Launch an idea, the AIs discuss among themselves and you get a unified response.
brainstorm.title: Brainstormer
brainstorm.desc: Throw in an idea. The 4 AIs deliberate in two rounds and deliver a unified, reasoned response.

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer
multiplayer.desc: From 1 to 4 humans debate with 4 AIs simultaneously. The true public arena.

topicPicker.title: Pick a starting point
topicPicker.subtitle: 4 AIs will start debating your topic in real time.
topicPicker.noAccount: No account required for the demo
presets: Will AI make people more free or more controlled?
Have social media done more good or harm to democracy?
Is capitalism still the best system to reduce poverty?

modeMessages.chat: To start the debate with the 4 AIs, create a free account.
modeMessages.2v2: To join the 2 vs 2 you need an account. It takes 30 seconds.
modeMessages.devil: Devil's Advocate requires the Pro plan. Upgrade to Pro to unlock this mode.
modeMessages.brainstorm: Brainstormer requires the Pro plan. Upgrade to Pro to unlock this mode.
